name: AuBEX CORPORATION
summary: AuBEX CORPORATION manufactures and sells nibs and medical equipment in Japan and internationally. The company offers nibs made from polyester fibers, nylon fibers, acrylic fibers, plastics, and other materials used in lighting, marking, painting, presentation, and makeup applications, as well as for PC peripherals. It also provides medical equipment and components, such as pressure infusion instruments and angiography guide wires for public and private university hospitals, and other hospitals. The company was formerly known as Tokyo hat Co., Ltd. and changed its name to AuBEX CORPORATION in 1985. AuBEX CORPORATION was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
